- introductionText - string, max 1000
- letterDate - date
- objections - array, min 1

  - comment - string, max 20000
- respondByDate - date
- submitterName - string, max 100
- hasResponse - boolean
- The filing source should be RAMP.

  - objectionOrder - number, integer, required
  - comment - string, max 20000
- respondByDate - date
- submitterName - string, max 100
- hasResponse - boolean
- The filing source should be RAMP.
